category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tofuenv as an OpenTofu version manager.
source_facts.description says it is an OpenTofu version manager inspired by tfenv.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use tofuenv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, environment variables, upgrade, and uninstall sections.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tofuutils/tofuenv; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: Official README documents CLI install/use flows for OpenTofu versions.
